summary: Iteration 29: PIX data, withdrawal requests, and registration skip features tested. Backend: 9/10 tests passed (1 skipped due to balance > 0). Frontend: All features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: PUT /api/establishments/me/pix saves PIX data correctly (key_type, key, holder_name, bank)
Backend: GET /api/establishments/me/financial returns pix_data and withdrawal_requests
Backend: POST /api/establishments/me/withdraw rejects amount=0 with 400 error
Backend: POST /api/establishments/me/withdraw rejects negative amount with 400 error
Backend: POST /api/establishments/me/withdraw rejects if already has pending request
Backend: POST /api/establishments/me/withdraw rejects amount exceeding balance
Backend: GET /api/admin/withdrawals returns pending_requests list and establishments_with_balance
Backend: POST /api/establishments (skip flow) creates establishment with only business_name and category
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Créditos Recebidos' card with R$ value (R$ 21,50)
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Solicitar Resgate' button (green, enabled when balance > 0)
Frontend: Dashboard shows pending withdrawal badge 'Saque de R$ 21,50 pendente' (orange)
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Meu Perfil' in Ações Rápidas section with subtitle 'Editar dados, CEP e categoria'
Frontend: Click 'Solicitar Resgate' with pending request shows alert: 'Solicitação pendente - Você já possui uma solicitação de saque de R$ 21,50 aguardando aprovação.'
Frontend: 'Meu Perfil' action card navigates to /establishment/offers page
Frontend: Registration page shows 'Preencher depois' skip button
Frontend: 'Preencher depois' requires only business_name and category (both mandatory)
Frontend: 'Preencher depois' successfully creates establishment and redirects to dashboard
Frontend: New establishment dashboard shows R$ 0,00 balance with disabled 'Solicitar Resgate' button
Frontend: Dark theme with green accents maintained throughout
critical_code_review_comments: dashboard.tsx: Withdrawal modal correctly implements 2-step flow (pix -> confirm)
dashboard.tsx: PIX data pre-fill from financialData works correctly
dashboard.tsx: Pending request check prevents duplicate withdrawal requests
dashboard.tsx: Balance check prevents withdrawal when balance <= 0
register.tsx: handleSkip() correctly validates business_name and category before proceeding
register.tsx: Skip flow creates establishment with minimal data (no CEP required)
server.py: PUT /api/establishments/me/pix correctly saves all PIX fields
server.py: POST /api/establishments/me/withdraw validates amount, balance, PIX data, and pending requests
server.py: GET /api/admin/withdrawals returns both pending_requests and establishments_with_balance
seed_data_creation: Created test establishments via skip flow: test_skip_52649@test.com (Skip Test Business). PIX data updated for teste@estabelecimento.com.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 complete. All PIX data and withdrawal request features working correctly. The establishment 'teste@estabelecimento.com' has a pending withdrawal request of R$ 21,50 with PIX data (CPF/CNPJ: 12345678901, Titular: Teste Titular, Banco: Nubank). The 'Preencher depois' skip button on registration works correctly - only requires business_name and category. The 'Meu Perfil' action card navigates to /establishment/offers where profile edit is available.

features_verified.put_pix_data: WORKING - Saves key_type, key, holder_name, bank correctly
features_verified.withdraw_validation: WORKING - Rejects invalid amount, exceeding balance, duplicate pending
features_verified.admin_withdrawals: WORKING - Returns pending_requests list and establishments_with_balance
features_verified.dashboard_credits_card: WORKING - Shows R$ value, pending badge, Solicitar Resgate button
features_verified.dashboard_meu_perfil: WORKING - Shows in Ações Rápidas, navigates to /establishment/offers
features_verified.withdrawal_modal_pending_alert: WORKING - Shows alert when pending request exists
features_verified.registration_skip_button: WORKING - 'Preencher depois' creates establishment with minimal data
